title: Modern Immersive Cavegen Retexture
description: Vanilla-like retexture for ICg featuring textures by Jerome226
body:
# Modern ICg Retexture

A retexture of Immersive Cavegen that includes vanilla-like, modern-looking stalactites, stalagmites, and pillars. Players that prefer the 1.13+ drawing style might especially prefer this over the original textures of the mod.

### Credits

These textures were contributed on a voluntary basis by Jerome226, who has given me the permission to upload them as a texture pack.
